changelog:
v1.8.3 (Institutional Hardened Edition):
- [AUDIT STAGE 1] Core Stability: Resolved 'AttributeError' by ensuring all runtime variables are pre-initialized in __init__.
- [AUDIT STAGE 2] Risk Intelligence: Restored execution link for 'handle_periodic_tasks' to ensure Anti-Whipsaw is active.
- [AUDIT STAGE 3] AI Excellence: Integrated 'google_search' tools into AI Advisor for real-time news correlation.
- [AUDIT STAGE 4] UI Integrity: Fully resolved empty table bug by synchronizing 'tree' and 'tree_hist' widget references.
- [AUDIT STAGE 5] Build Standards: 100% PEP8/Ruff compliance and UTF-8 encoding stabilization for global deployment.
- [AUDIT STAGE 6] Institutional UX: Restored Triple EMA (21, 50, 200) chart visualization and repositioned trade levels for clarity.
- [FIX] Thread Safety: Implemented 'threading.Lock' across all MT5 handlers to prevent data race conditions.
- [FIX] Splash Sync: Implemented 'Smart Pause' at 25% progress to ensure license validation before dashboard entry.
- [FIX] HWID Hardening: Resolved OEM motherboard serial bugs and optimized PowerShell fallback for Windows 11 compatibility.
- [FIX] Syntax Audit: Eliminated 'Expected an expression' indentation errors in security and core modules.
- [SYSTEM] Watchdog Guardian: Implemented automated self-healing for the background data fetcher thread.
